one_line: Formalized the graduation framework (trust tiers T0-T3 by blast radius, conjunctive Wilson-gated graduation, hard-zero-trap, EarnedAutonomy predicate, asymmetric revocation) grounded in rex/scoring.py+escalate.py+loop.py; runnable reference impl graduation.py with 25/25 passing tests; honest finding that the live n=5 sweep grants only provisional T0.
